name: schema-registry-dag-schema-version-manager
description: T190 SchemaVersionManager — VALIDATION archetype (inline). Classifies schema changes as BREAKING or ADDITIVE, resolves latest version, validates format. BREAKING→approval-required, ADDITIVE→fast-path.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: BREAKING vs ADDITIVE classification, latest version resolution, format validation, inline call contract from T189
Retrieve VALIDATION arch pattern + breaking-change-gate + schema-version-pin + additive-fast-path patterns for T190
Break T190 into: resolve-latest-version → classify-change-type → validate-format → return BREAKING or ADDITIVE classification with rationale

Generate schema-version-manager.service.ts — classifyChange() returns BREAKING or ADDITIVE, resolveLatestVersion() reads pinned version from DATABASE, NEVER modifies schema state inline. BREAKING path emits approval-required signal, ADDITIVE path returns fast-path clearance. Called inline by T189 at step 3.
Named check validation: classifyChange_returns_enum, resolveLatestVersion_reads_db, no_state_mutation_inline, breaking_approval_signal, additive_fast_path
Score generated code 0-100 against T190 iron rules: correct BREAKING/ADDITIVE classification, version resolution accuracy, no side effects
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate

DPO triple: chosen=breaking-routes-to-approval+additive-fast-path+version-resolved-from-db, rejected=all-changes-treated-as-breaking OR version-hardcoded OR state-mutation-in-classifier. curriculumTier=1.
